title: PixelCraft Modpack
description: Client-side realism modpack: better graphics, audio, and performance for Minecraft 1.21.4 and for the Minecraft Server PixelCraft.
body:
🛠️ PixelCraft - A More Realistic Minecraft Experience

PixelCraft is a client-side modpack that enhances immersion, graphics, and performance in Minecraft – ideal for private multiplayer servers or solo play.

🔍 Features & Highlights

🌿 Immersion & Realism

Presence Footsteps, AmbientSounds, Dramatic Skys, Eating Animation, Physics Mod → Enjoy realistic sounds, visual effects, and physical interactions.

👁️ Visual Enhancements

Iris Shaders, Complementary Shaders, Distant Horizons, Fancy Beds/Crops, Better Leaves → Beautiful shaders, extended render distance, and decorative improvements.

⚙️ Performance Boost

Sodium, Lithium, Entity Culling, Dynamic FPS, FerriteCore → Smoother gameplay and better FPS – even on low-end systems.

💬 Multiplayer Support

Simple Voice Chat, InvMove, Chat Heads → Built-in voice chat, improved movement, and better chat visuals.

🧭 Quality of Life Improvements

AppleSkin, JourneyMap, BetterF3, Not Enough Animations, Spark → Enhanced HUD, minimap, debug tools, and more animations.

🎮 Technical Info
Minecraft Version: 1.21.4
Mod Loader: Fabric
All mods are client-side only – no server installation needed!

Works in single-player and multiplayer
